seo.title: Nefara - Web, mobile and desktop applications to help your business grow.
seo.description: At Nefara we build web, mobile, and desktop applications, as well as AI solutions tailored to your business. From modern apps to custom AI development, Nefara helps companies grow, innovate, and stay competitive.

header.aboutDesc: Who we are, what we believe in, and the work we put our name on
header.teamDesc: The developers and designers behind every project we deliver

hero.title: Never
hero.content: Nefara offers software services and specialises in solutions, built to accelerate business growth - from a website for your business to building full software systems.
hero.scrollCta: Scroll to see what makes us different

seo.title: Services – Nefara | Web, Mobile & Desktop Development
seo.description: Explore Nefara's software services: responsive web apps, cross-platform mobile apps, and powerful desktop software — all built with modern tech and AI integration.

services.title: Our Services
services.content: Comprehensive software development services designed to transform your ideas into powerful digital solutions that scale with your business.

content.text: Modern, responsive websites and web applications built with cutting-edge technologies that deliver exceptional user experiences.
Native and cross-platform mobile applications that provide seamless experiences across iOS and Android devices.
content.content1: Cross platform for all operating systems

content.text: Powerful desktop software solutions for Windows, macOS, and Linux with native performance and intuitive interfaces.
content.content1: Cross platform for all operating systems

services.subtext: Don't see exactly what you need? We create custom solutions for unique challenges.

services.pageSubtitle: Nefara offers a full range of digital services — from a website for your business to building complete software systems.

websites.title: Websites
websites.desc: Business sites, landing pages and online stores — fast, responsive and SEO-optimised. Personalised to your brand, goals and vision.

mobile.title: Mobile Apps
mobile.desc: Native and cross-platform apps for iOS and Android, integrated to your exact personal requirements.

desktop.title: Desktop Apps
desktop.desc: Desktop solutions for Windows and macOS, from internal tools to full product platforms.

software.title: Software Systems
software.desc: Backend systems, APIs, databases and microservices, built to the scale and needs of your business.

seoItem.title: SEO Optimisation
seoItem.desc: Technical and content optimisation that boosts your rankings and drives more traffic — including AI-ready visibility for your business.

support.title: Support
support.desc: Our commitment doesn't end at delivery. We monitor, update and optimise your product at every stage of your business growth.

tech.s1: What distinguishes us from most agencies is that we don't rely solely on ready-made solutions. At Nefara, we develop our own software and integrate it directly into the products we build for our clients.
tech.s2: One of them is Quicx — the fastest and lightest task queue engine of its kind, built entirely by us in C. While other solutions compromise between speed and efficiency, Quicx makes none. Integrating it into the systems we build means faster processing, fewer resources, and a more stable product — without affecting the cost to the client.
tech.s3: A deep understanding of the technology behind our own software gives us an advantage that is hard to achieve from the outside: we know every detail of how the system works, which lets us optimise, scale and maintain it at a level that standard tools simply cannot match.

howWeWork.heading: How we work
howWeWork.subtitle: A transparent, three-step process — from first conversation to final delivery.

step1.title: First meeting
step1.content: We start with a personal meeting where we get to know you, understand the project, and align on the terms. Throughout development we maintain constant communication — at every enquiry we keep you informed about what is happening and what stage we are at. We are available to you 24/7.

step2.title: Review & delivery
step2.content: When the product is ready, we present it for review. If anything does not meet your expectations, we fix the issues — at no extra charge. You pay only when you are completely satisfied with the final result.

step3.title: No obligation
step3.content: If at the end of the process you decide to walk away, you owe nothing. The only thing we retain is the right to use the project as part of our portfolio.

seo.title: Team – Nefara | Meet the People Behind the Software
seo.description: Meet the Nefara team — a group of passionate developers, designers, and project managers dedicated to building exceptional software solutions for your business.

about.title: About
about.content: We're not just developers — we're your digital transformation partners, committed to turning your vision into reality with precision and creativity.
about.subtitle: Transforming Your Ideas Into
about.paragraph1: From concept to deployment, we handle every aspect of your software development journey. Our team combines technical expertise with creative problem-solving to deliver solutions that exceed expectations.
about.paragraph2: Whether you're a startup disrupting an industry or an enterprise optimizing operations, we scale our approach to match your ambitions and timeline.
about.ownToolsStatement: We use our software systems to improve our products.

directContact.title: Direct communication with developers
directContact.content: When working with Nefara, you communicate directly with the developers building your product — no middlemen and no wasted time.

ownTools.title: Our own software systems
ownTools.content: At Nefara we develop our own software systems and integrate them directly into the solutions we build for clients. This gives us a deep understanding of the technology behind our products and allows us to deliver faster, more stable, and more efficient results.

seoOptimization.title: SEO Optimization
seoOptimization.content: We optimize your digital presence so your website ranks higher in search engines, attracts more traffic, and stands out from the competition.

maintenance.title: Support
maintenance.content: Our commitment doesn't end at launch. We treat your software as our own - monitoring it in real time, optimizing performance, and keeping it up to date at every stage of your business growth.
